hero.title: CBAM compliance, from supplier data to declaration-ready calculations
hero.description: Arvenza helps exporters collect supplier emission data, calculate embedded emissions and prepare audit-ready CBAM evidence — in one structured workflow.
hero.platformVision: Arvenza RegTech is built on the EU Sustainability Compliance Platform vision — covering CBAM, PPWR, EUDR, Digital Product Passport and supplier evidence workflows.

problem.title: CBAM preparation should not fall apart before the declaration
problem.description: When supplier data, calculation methodology and evidence files live in different places, the same operational crisis restarts every quarter.

item1.title: Supplier data stays trapped in email and Excel
item1.description: Collecting data takes weeks; formats are inconsistent and gaps are spotted too late.

item2.title: CBAM calculations require methodology and traceability
item2.description: Direct/indirect split, electricity footprint, assumptions and default value comparisons increase error risk when tracked manually.

item3.title: When declaration time arrives, the evidence crisis begins
item3.description: Supporting documents, supplier declarations and calculation notes are not ready in one file — so the process compresses into the final days.

hero.description: CBAM Calculation Engine unites supplier data intake, embedded emissions calculation, methodology audit trails and evidence file preparation in one disciplined product flow.

challenge.title: The hardest part of CBAM preparation is not calculation — it is keeping the process together
challenge.description: When supplier inputs, calculation logic and supporting evidence live in different places, teams face the same operational pressure every declaration cycle.

item1.title: Supplier data stays outside the flow
item1.description: Emission inputs scatter across email and spreadsheets — gaps are often discovered only as the declaration window approaches.

item2.title: Calculation logic must be traceable
item2.description: Direct and indirect allocation, electricity footprints, assumptions and default value comparisons require an auditable methodology trail.

item3.title: Evidence files must be ready before the deadline
item3.description: When supplier declarations, supporting documents and methodology notes are not assembled in one review file, teams must rebuild the process under pressure.

workflow.title: A six-step CBAM workflow under control
workflow.description: From scope assessment to continuous tracking, the full preparation path is structured around how teams actually work.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about CBAM Calculation Engine

item1.question: Does Arvenza guarantee CBAM declarations?
item1.answer: No. Arvenza does not guarantee compliance outcomes. The platform helps structure supplier data, calculations and evidence for CBAM preparation — your team remains responsible for declaration decisions.

item2.question: Can suppliers enter data directly?
item2.answer: Yes. Controlled supplier access, structured data requests and evidence upload are built into the intake workflow — reducing manual follow-up for compliance teams.

item3.question: Is calculation methodology traceable?
item3.answer: Yes. Methodology notes, assumptions and audit trail are structured within the calculation workflow to support internal review and validation.

item4.question: Can evidence files be shared with external stakeholders?
item4.answer: Yes. Outputs can be prepared for importers, internal teams or verifier briefing as structured evidence packs — not ad hoc document folders.

cta.title: See how to manage CBAM preparation in one product flow

hero.title: EU Sustainability Regulatory Coverage
hero.description: Structured platform support for the regulations shaping EU trade, manufacturing, and supply chain compliance.

cbam.title: CBAM — Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism
cbam.description: The EU's carbon border adjustment mechanism requires importers to report embedded emissions and purchase CBAM certificates. Arvenza RegTech structures calculation, declaration, and verification workflows into audit-ready digital processes.

ppwr.title: PPWR — Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
ppwr.description: PPWR introduces comprehensive requirements for packaging design, recyclability, and extended producer responsibility. Arvenza RegTech manages packaging data, tracks compliance metrics, and supports reporting obligations.

eudr.title: EUDR — EU Deforestation Regulation
eudr.description: EUDR requires operators and traders to conduct due diligence to ensure commodities are deforestation-free. Arvenza RegTech provides geolocation, risk assessment, and traceability evidence management.

dpp.title: DPP / ESPR — Digital Product Passport
dpp.description: The Ecodesign for Sustainable Products Regulation introduces Digital Product Passports requiring structured product lifecycle data. Arvenza RegTech enables passport creation, data management, and regulatory alignment.

supplier.title: Supplier Evidence Management
supplier.description: Cross-regulation supplier data collection and evidence management — ensuring traceable, validated documentation across your supply chain for audit readiness.

csrd.title: CSRD / ESRS — Corporate Sustainability Reporting
csrd.description: Supportive platform coverage for CSRD-aligned sustainability reporting — structured ESG evidence collection and ESRS-aligned data management.

cta.title: Need structured compliance for these regulations?
cta.description: Discover how ARVENZA maps regulatory requirements to actionable platform workflows.

hero.title: Insights & Regulatory Intelligence
hero.description: Stay informed with regulation updates, compliance guides, and platform insights from the ARVENZA team.

hero.title: EU Sustainability Compliance, Engineered as a Platform

positioning.title: Our Positioning
positioning.description: ARVENZA is not a consultancy. It is a purpose-built RegTech platform that transforms EU sustainability regulations into structured, scalable, audit-ready digital workflows. We serve exporters, manufacturers, and supply chain operators who need intelligent compliance infrastructure — not slide decks.

expertise.title: Depth of Expertise
expertise.description: Built on over 20 years of sustainability and regulatory expertise, ARVENZA combines deep domain knowledge with modern platform architecture. Our modules are regulation-specific, workflow-driven, and designed for the complexity of EU trade compliance.

companyPage.title: Arvenza RegTech is a product brand built for EU sustainability compliance
companyPage.description: Arvenza RegTech is operated by Anka Sustainability B.V., supporting exporters, manufacturers, and supply chain teams in turning EU sustainability regulations into structured digital workflows.

whatIs.title: What is Arvenza?
whatIs.body: Arvenza RegTech is the EU Sustainability Compliance Platform — a product brand whose flagship product is CBAM Calculation Engine, focused on structured CBAM preparation, supplier data collection, embedded emissions calculation, and audit-ready documentation.

experience.title: Built on regulatory implementation experience
experience.body: The platform is designed around real CBAM preparation workflows: supplier data intake, embedded emissions calculation with methodology audit trail, and declaration-ready evidence packs organized in a structured workflow.

operator.title: Product brand operated by Anka Sustainability B.V.
operator.body: Arvenza RegTech is operated by Anka Sustainability B.V., the Netherlands (KvK: 99787784). All platform services are provided by Anka Sustainability B.V. Arvenza is the product brand — not a separate legal entity.

legal.title: Legal positioning
legal.body: Platform services, contractual relationships, and data processing are provided under Anka Sustainability B.V. The Arvenza RegTech brand identifies the product and platform experience delivered by Anka Sustainability B.V.

cta.title: See CBAM Calculation Engine in your own workflow context

regulationsCbam.title: CBAM compliance requires supplier data and traceable calculation infrastructure
regulationsCbam.description: Arvenza RegTech supports CBAM preparation by managing product scope, supplier data, embedded emissions calculation, and evidence packs in a structured digital workflow.

requirements.title: What does CBAM require?
requirements.body: CBAM requires importers and operators to report embedded emissions for covered goods, supported by supplier data, calculation methodology, and auditable evidence. Preparation spans product scope, supplier engagement, and structured documentation.

supplierData.title: Why is supplier data critical?
supplierData.body: Embedded emissions calculations depend on accurate supplier-specific data. Without structured supplier data collection and evidence intake, calculations lack traceability and audit-ready documentation.

emissions.title: How should embedded emissions calculation be structured?
emissions.body: Calculations should follow a documented methodology with an audit trail linking inputs, assumptions, and outputs. A structured workflow ensures consistency across products, suppliers, and reporting periods.

evidence.title: Evidence packs and declaration preparation
evidence.body: CBAM preparation requires organizing supplier responses, calculation outputs, and supporting documentation into declaration-ready evidence packs that compliance teams can review and submit.

support.title: How does Arvenza support CBAM preparation?
support.body: CBAM Calculation Engine combines supplier data collection, embedded emissions calculation, methodology audit trail, and audit-ready documentation in one structured workflow — from supplier intake to declaration-ready evidence.

s1.title: Introduction and scope
s1.body: This document applies to the Arvenza RegTech website and platform services provided by Anka Sustainability B.V., the Netherlands (KvK: 99787784). Arvenza RegTech is a product brand — all services are provided by Anka Sustainability B.V.

s2.title: Information we collect
s2.body: We may collect contact details, organization information, usage data, and communications submitted through demo requests, resource subscriptions, or platform use.

s3.title: Your rights and choices
s3.body: Depending on applicable law, you may have rights to access, correct, or delete personal data. Contact us at info@ankasustainability.com to exercise these rights.

s4.title: Security and retention
s4.body: We apply appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect data. Retention periods depend on the nature of the data and legal requirements.

s5.title: Updates
s5.body: We may update this document to reflect changes in services, regulation, or legal requirements. The last updated date at the top indicates the current version.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Terms governing use of Arvenza RegTech platform services provided by Anka Sustainability B.V.
terms.contact: For questions about this policy, contact info@ankasustainability.com. Arvenza RegTech is a product brand operated by Anka Sustainability B.V., the Netherlands. KvK: 99787784.

s1.title: Agreement
s1.body: By accessing Arvenza RegTech services, you agree to these terms with Anka Sustainability B.V., the service provider. Arvenza RegTech is the product brand under which services are delivered.

s2.title: Platform services
s2.body: The platform supports structured CBAM preparation workflows including supplier data collection, embedded emissions calculation, and audit-ready documentation. Service scope is defined in applicable agreements.

s3.title: Acceptable use
s3.body: You agree to use the platform lawfully and not to misuse, reverse engineer, or attempt unauthorized access to systems or data.

s4.title: Limitation of liability
s4.body: Services are provided subject to applicable agreements. Anka Sustainability B.V. does not guarantee regulatory outcomes; the platform supports structured compliance preparation workflows.

s5.title: Governing law
s5.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Netherlands unless otherwise agreed in writing.

s1.title: What are cookies?
s1.body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site function and may support analytics and preferences.

s2.title: Cookies we use
s2.body: We may use essential cookies for site functionality, preference cookies for language selection, and analytics cookies to understand site usage. Specific cookies may be updated as the site evolves.

s3.title: Managing cookies
s3.body: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling certain cookies may affect site functionality.

s4.title: Third parties
s4.body: Some embedded services or analytics providers may set their own cookies subject to their policies.

s5.title: Updates
s5.body: This cookie policy may be updated. Check the last updated date for the current version.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.description: Our commitment to digital accessibility for the Arvenza RegTech website.
accessibility.contact: For questions about this policy, contact info@ankasustainability.com. Arvenza RegTech is a product brand operated by Anka Sustainability B.V., the Netherlands. KvK: 99787784.

s1.title: Commitment
s1.body: Anka Sustainability B.V. aims to make the Arvenza RegTech website accessible to users with diverse needs, in line with recognized accessibility standards where practicable.

s2.title: Measures
s2.body: We use semantic HTML, sufficient color contrast where possible, keyboard navigability, and descriptive labels for interactive elements.

s3.title: Known limitations
s3.body: Some third-party content or legacy components may not fully meet accessibility standards. We continue to improve the site over time.

s4.title: Feedback
s4.body: If you encounter accessibility barriers, contact info@ankasustainability.com with a description of the issue and the page URL.

s5.title: Review
s5.body: This statement was prepared in June 2026 and will be reviewed periodically.
